metadata.description: Deploy Cosmos DB resources.
Deploy a .NET Function App (via unified Modules/functionapp.bicep).
Deploy a .NET App Service (via unified Modules/appservice.bicep).
Deploy Azure Front Door and WAF policy.
Deploy alert rules and action groups.
Deploy Azure Service Bus namespace.
Deploy Azure Bot Service with a dedicated bot host App Service.
Daily ingestion cap in GB for Log Analytics.
Service Bus SKU. Premium required for private endpoints.
Optional list of Service Bus queue names to create.
Display name shown in Teams and the Azure portal.
Bot Service SKU. F0 for free tier, S1 for standard.
Entra ID app registration client secret for the bot host platform auth.
Enable Microsoft Teams channel on the bot.
Enable an OAuth SSO connection (Entra ID / Microsoft Graph) on the bot.
Entra ID app registration client ID for the bot SSO connection (can differ from botMsaAppId).
Entra ID app registration client secret for the bot SSO connection.
OAuth scopes for the bot SSO connection.
Custom LLM API endpoint URL for the bot Agent SDK.
Key Vault secret name containing the custom LLM API key.
Identity type for the function app. SystemAssigned or UserAssigned.

variables.functionAppSettings: [if(parameters('enableFunctionApp'), createObject('KeyVaultConfig:Name', variables('keyVaultName'), 'AzureWebJobs.FunctionName.Schedule', '0 */5 * * * *', 'Config:CosmosContainer', parameters('cosmosContainerName'), 'Config:MetricsTimeRangeInMinutes', 5, 'Config:MetricTypeMaxCount', 5, 'Config:Subscriptions', null(), 'Config:ResourceGroups', null()), createObject())]

metadata.description: Service Bus SKU. Premium required for private endpoints and advanced features.
Messaging units for Premium SKU. Valid values: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16.
Enable zone redundancy for the namespace.
Optional list of queue names to create.
Custom app settings merged into the function app configuration.
Identity type for the function app. Use UserAssigned for cross-tenant or shared identity scenarios.
Cosmos DB account name for SQL role assignment. Leave empty to skip.
Service Bus namespace name for Data Receiver role assignment. Leave empty to skip.
App Service Plan SKU name. Default S1.
App Service Plan SKU tier. Default Standard.

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', variables('functionAppName'), 'appsettings')]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('appinsightsName')), '2020-02-02').InstrumentationKey, 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('appinsightsName')), '2020-02-02').ConnectionString, 'ApplicationInsightsAgent_EXTENSION_VERSION', '~2', 'InstrumentationEngine_EXTENSION_VERSION', 'disabled', 'XDT_MicrosoftApplicationInsights_BaseExtension', 'disabled', 'XDT_MicrosoftApplicationInsights_Mode', 'recommended', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'AzureWebJobsStorage__credential', 'managedidentity', 'FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION', '~4', 'FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME', parameters('functionAppRuntime'), 'FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME_VERSION', parameters('functionAppRuntimeVersion'), 'WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE', '1'), if(variables('isSystemAssigned'), variables('systemAssignedSettings'), createObject('APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_AUTHENTICATION_STRING', format('Authorization=AAD;ClientId={0}', if(variables('isSystemAssigned'), '', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('uai-data-owner-{0}', parameters('appName'))), '2024-11-30').clientId)), 'AzureWebJobsStorage__clientId', if(variables('isSystemAssigned'), '', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('uai-data-owner-{0}', parameters('appName'))), '2024-11-30').clientId))), parameters('appSettings'))]

resources.name: [variables('functionAppName')]
resources.identity: [if(variables('isSystemAssigned'), createObject('type', 'SystemAssigned'), createObject('type', 'UserAssigned', 'userAssignedIdentities', createObject(format('{0}', resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('uai-data-owner-{0}', parameters('appName')))), createObject())))]

resources.name: [guid(subscription().id, resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), 'Storage Blob Data Contributor')]
[guid(subscription().id, resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), 'Key Vault Secrets User')]
[guid(subscription().id, resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), 'Key Vault Reader')]

[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('cosmosAccountName'), guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosAccountName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), 'Cosmos DB Contributor'))]

[guid(subscription().id, resourceId('Microsoft.ServiceBus/namespaces', parameters('serviceBusNamespaceName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), 'Service Bus Data Receiver')]

metadata.description: Entra ID app registration client ID for platform auth.
App setting name that holds the Entra ID client credential.
Entra ID app registration client secret for platform auth.
App Service Plan SKU name. Default S1.
App Service Plan SKU tier. Default Standard.
.NET runtime version for the bot host.
Custom LLM API endpoint URL injected as app setting.
Key Vault secret name containing the custom LLM API key.
Resource ID of the shared user-assigned managed identity.
Principal ID of the shared user-assigned managed identity.
Client ID of the shared user-assigned managed identity.

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', variables('botAppServiceName'), 'appsettings')]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('appinsightsName')), '2020-02-02').InstrumentationKey, 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_AUTHENTICATION_STRING', format('Authorization=AAD;ClientId={0}', parameters('userAssignedIdentityClientId')), 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('appinsightsName')), '2020-02-02').ConnectionString, 'ApplicationInsightsAgent_EXTENSION_VERSION', '~2', 'InstrumentationEngine_EXTENSION_VERSION', 'disabled', 'XDT_MicrosoftApplicationInsights_BaseExtension', 'disabled', 'XDT_MicrosoftApplicationInsights_Mode', 'recommended', 'WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE', '1', 'MicrosoftAppType', 'UserAssignedMSI', 'MicrosoftAppId', parameters('authClientId'), 'MicrosoftAppTenantId', tenant().tenantId, 'MicrosoftAppPassword', '', 'WEBSITE_AUTH_AAD_ALLOWED_TENANTS', tenant().tenantId), variables('authSecretSetting'), if(not(empty(parameters('llmApiEndpoint'))), createObject('LlmApi:Endpoint', parameters('llmApiEndpoint'), 'LlmApi:KeySecretName', parameters('llmApiKeySecretName'), 'LlmApi:KeyVaultUri', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), '2025-05-01').vaultUri), createObject()))]

resources.name: [guid(subscription().id, resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('botAppServiceName')), 'Key Vault Secrets User')]
[guid(subscription().id, resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('botAppServiceName')), 'Key Vault Reader')]

metadata.description: Hostname of the dedicated bot host App Service (e.g. app-mybot.azurewebsites.net).
Resource ID of the shared user-assigned managed identity.
Client ID of the Entra ID app registration used as msaAppId.
Bot Service SKU. F0 for free, S1 for standard.
Enable the Microsoft Teams channel.
Enable an OAuth SSO connection for Entra ID / Microsoft Graph.
Display name for the SSO connection.
Entra ID app registration client ID for the SSO connection.
Entra ID app registration client secret for the SSO connection.
OAuth scopes for the SSO connection (space-separated).
Application Insights instrumentation key for bot telemetry.
Application Insights app ID for bot telemetry.
Entra ID app registration client ID. Leave empty to skip auth configuration.
Entra ID app registration client secret. Leave empty to skip auth configuration.
Front Door profile ID (GUID). Leave empty to skip Front Door IP restrictions.
Front Door endpoint URL (https://...). Leave empty to skip Front Door auth redirect.
App Service Plan SKU name. Default S1.
App Service Plan SKU tier. Default Standard.

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', variables('appServiceName'), 'authsettingsV2')]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('globalValidation', createObject('requireAuthentication', true(), 'unauthenticatedClientAction', 'RedirectToLoginPage'), 'platform', createObject('enabled', true(), 'runtimeVersion', '2'), 'identityProviders', createObject('azureActiveDirectory', createObject('enabled', true(), 'registration', createObject('clientId', parameters('authClientId'), 'clientSecretSettingName', 'ENTRAID_AUTH_AAD_SECRET', 'openIdIssuer', format('https://sts.windows.net/{0}/v2.0', tenant().tenantId)), 'validation', if(variables('useFrontDoor'), createObject('allowedAudiences', createArray(parameters('frontDoorUrl'))), createObject())))), if(variables('useFrontDoor'), createObject('httpSettings', createObject('requireHttps', true(), 'forwardProxy', createObject('convention', 'Standard')), 'login', createObject('allowedExternalRedirectUrls', createArray(format('{0}/.auth/login/aad/callback', parameters('frontDoorUrl'))))), createObject()))]

resources.name: [guid(subscription().id, resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('appServiceName')), 'Key Vault Secrets User')]
[guid(subscription().id, resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('appServiceName')), 'Key Vault Reader')]

alertRuleQuery.value: (traces | where severityLevel == 3 or severityLevel == 4 | project timestamp, message, operation_Id) | union (exceptions | project timestamp, outerMessage, operation_Id)
(traces | where severityLevel == 3 or severityLevel == 4 | project timestamp, message, operation_Id) | union (exceptions | project timestamp, outerMessage, operation_Id)
(traces | where severityLevel == 3 or severityLevel == 4 | project timestamp, message, operation_Id) | union (exceptions | project timestamp, outerMessage, operation_Id)
